derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_InvoiceLine WHERE C_Invoice_ID=@C_Invoice_ID@
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_INVOICETAX WHERE C_Invoice_ID=@C_Invoice_ID@
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_INVOICE_DISCOUNT WHERE C_INVOICE_ID=@C_INVOICE_ID@
